b:T1fce,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. platelets respond to/detect skin/blood vessel damage ✔</p>
<p>b. platelets release clotting factors ✔</p>
<p>c. clotting factors trigger a chain/cascade of reactions ✔</p>
<p>d. «leading to» formation of thrombin ✔</p>
<p>e. thrombin causes fibrinogen conversion into fibrin ✔</p>
<p>f. blood clot seals the wound due to fibrin network of fibres ✔</p>
<p><em>Accept answers presented as a flow chart</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. «first set of» gametes/parental genotype I<sup>A</sup>, i ✔</p>
<p>b. «other set of» gametes/parental genotype I<sup>B</sup>, i ✔</p>
<p>c. «genotypes of offspring are respectively» I<sup>A</sup>I<sup>B</sup>, I<sup>B</sup>i, I<sup>A</sup>i, ii ✔ <em>All four correct required</em>.</p>
<p>d. «phenotypes of offspring are respectively» AB, B, A, O ✔ <em>All four correct required linked to genotypes</em></p>
<p><em>Award marks only for the first grid if more than one drawn;</em><br/><em>e.g. of Punnett grid</em></p>
<p><em><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></em></p>
<p><em>Answers can be given in a Punnett grid or in prose</em>.</p>
<p><em>Accept the four possible blood groups of the offspring anywhere in the answer</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. air carried through trachea <em><strong>AND</strong></em> bronchi/bronchioles <em><strong>AND</strong></em> alveoli ✔ <em>All three required in correct order.</em></p>
<p>b. alveoli increase the surface area/thin walled for gas exchange ✔</p>
<p>c. gas exchange carried out through type I pneumocytes ✔</p>
<p>d. type II pneumocytes secrete surfactant to reduce surface tension ✔</p>
<p>e. moist surface/surfactant allows gases to diffuse in solution ✔</p>
<p>f. ventilation/moving blood maintains concentration gradients of oxygen and carbon dioxide ✔</p>
<p>g. between air in alveoli and blood in «adjacent» capillaries<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>oxygen diffuses from alveoli to capillaries and carbon dioxide from capillaries to alveoli ✔ <em>OWTTE</em></p>
<p>h. <span style="text-decoration: underline;">external</span> intercostal muscles/<span style="text-decoration: underline;">diaphragm</span> contract during inspiration ✔</p>
<p>i. lowering air pressure «in lungs»/increasing thorax volume ✔</p>
<p>j. relaxation of external intercostal muscles/diaphragm enable «passive» expiration ✔</p>
<p>k. <span style="text-decoration: underline;">internal</span> intercostal «and abdominal muscles» contract «to force» expiration ✔</p>
<p>l. expiration due to increasing air pressure «in lungs»/decreasing thorax volume ✔</p>
<p><em>Accept correctly annotated diagram</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/3/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","3"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19N.2.SL.TZ0.6"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","6-3-defence-against-infectious-disease, 3-4-inheritance, 6-4-gas-exchange"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;
